answer:
<think> I know that the 904th Expeditionary Air Refueling Squadron is a unit of the United States Air Force. I also know that the unit was previously assigned to Fairchild Air Force Base in Washington state. Fairchild Air Force Base was closed in 1997 as part of the Base Realignment and Closure (BRAC) process. Therefore, I can infer that the 904th Expeditionary Air Refueling Squadron was last assigned to Fairchild Air Force Base in 1997, the year it was closed. </think>
<answer> 1997 </answer>
